jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer (Vue 3 / TypeScript)
jobs.rawDescription: We are a leading European AI company developing large language models and generative platforms for enterprise and government clients. Our products combine high-performance technologies, transparency, accessibility, and data security, fully aligned with European regulatory and ethical standards. As a Senior Frontend Engineer, you will take ownership of building scalable, accessible, and high-quality user interfaces, including chat-based AI experiences. You will work closely with product, design, and backend teams to deliver inclusive, reliable, and maintainable frontend systems. Responsibilities: Design, build, and maintain frontend applications using Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia, and Vite Own and promote Accessibility (A11y) standards, ensuring inclusive user experiences Develop and maintain chat-based user interfaces integrated with backend APIs Write and maintain End-to-End tests using Playwright Work within a Nx monorepo and contribute to frontend architecture decisions Ensure high code quality through reviews, testing, and best practices Optimize performance, scalability, and long-term maintainability Collaborate closely with designers, backend engineers, and product managers Requirements: 4+ years of professional frontend development experience (most of which should have been in a production setup with real customers) Strong expertise in Vue.js (Vue 3) and TypeScript Proven experience implementing accessibility (A11y) standards Experience with state management (Pinia or similar) Solid experience with E2E testing (Playwright or equivalent) Strong CSS skills and experience with responsive design Experience working in monorepo environments (Nx or similar) Ability to take ownership and contribute at an architectural level Nice to have: Experience building chat, messaging, or real-time interfaces Familiarity with WebSockets, SSE, or real-time data flows Experience with AI-powered user interfaces Experience with design systems or component libraries Knowledge of CI/CD pi

score.reason: Perfect match: Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia with strong seniority and Spain-remote fit. Role is fundamentally about frontend UI/UX with AI products as product domain, not engineering focus.

Reedsy welcomes applicants of all cultures and backgrounds. jobs.title: Staff LLM Interaction Engineer (Europe remote - TS/Vue/NodeJS)
jobs.location: Berlin Office (+ Albania, Bosnia, Bulgaria, Croatia, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Kosovo, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Montenegro, Poland, Serbia, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Ukraine, Denmark, Norway, Finland, Sweden, Greece, Italy, Portugal, Spain, London Office, United Kingdom, Austria, Belgium, France, Ireland, Netherlands)
jobs.rawDescription: Staff LLM Interaction Engineer (Europe remote - TS/Vue/NodeJS) The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 260 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 188+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Backed by top investors, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our SAP's recent strategic investment - bringing us to a $5.2bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. The role As a Staff level LLM Interaction Engineer , you’ll help shape how n8n’s AI Workflow Builder works end-to-end. This staff level engineering role is focused on a critical product challenge: allowing both technical or less-technically proficient users of n8n to turn AI powered automated workflows into something they can rely on every day. That means building systems that consistently generate the right output, stay grounded in the user’s workflow, and improve quickly through iteration and evaluation. You’ll work on the orchestration layer between users, workflows, and LLMs - designing the context, tool interactions, and evaluation loops that make the product feel fast

score.reason: Staff-level role with Vue/TS in the stack, but primary focus is LLM orchestration and evaluation systems—fundamentally an AI/LLM engineering role rather than frontend development.

needsReview.rawDescription: Medior/Senior Developer - Ad Manager, B2B Digital Growth (Sanoma) Are you passionate about building smart, scalable digital solutions that empower digital sales and e-commerce? You'll be part of agile, customer-centric, cross-functional teams composed of professionals with complementary skills and shared goals, led by a Team Lead. We also manage numerous integrations with advertising partners and data platforms to meet business-specific needs. You'll collaborate closely with Digital Business, Ad Operations (Ad-Ops), Data Science, Data Platform, News and Delivery Platforms, and other Software Development Teams across Sanoma's Media Units. Your Role You'll primarily focus on front-end development, while also contributing to back-end and API development using our SaaS applications and development/AI tools to improve and build new services within AdManager. AdManager is widely used by businesses across Finland to buy advertising across the Sanoma Network. What We're Looking For Must-Haves: 7-8+ years of experience in software development Strong expertise in modern front-end development using TypeScript/JavaScript (we use Vue.js) A team player who elevates others through code reviews, mentoring, and sharing best practices Familiarity with Agile and DevOps methodologies AI-forward mindset and eagerness to incorporate AI tools into your daily work Excellent collaboration skills with stakeholders across business, tech, and partners A mindset focused on contin

needsReview.title: Fullstack Software Engineer RoR/JS W/M
needsReview.rawDescription: Fullstack Software Engineer RoR/JS W/M Are you looking to have an impact on the daily life of millions of entrepreneurs in France (and tomorrow in Europe)? Are you looking for a work environment that values trust, proactivity, and autonomy? Are our Engineering principles aligned with your vision? Then Pennylane is the right place for you ! Our vision We aim to become the most beloved financial Operating System of French SMEs and Accounting Firms (and soon, European ones). We help entrepreneurs rid themselves of time-consuming tasks related to accounting and finance while providing them with access to key financial information to assist in making the best decisions for their business.
